response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video: 00:00-00:52 contains a vocal performance. 00:52-05:00 is talking. 2. Identified song 'Gold Unbalance' on screen. 3. Used web search for 'Gold Unbalance 中嶋晴人 lyrics' to find the lyrics. 4. Verified lyrics on Uta-Net. 5. Mapped scenes to timestamps and confirmed no vocal music in the merchandise section.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a live performance of the song 'Gold Unbalance' by Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei, followed by an announcement and showcase of Mori Calliope's 2026 birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and Hoshimachi Suisei perform the song 'Gold Unbalance' on a stage with a crystalline backdrop.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope discusses and showcases her 'Birthday 2026' merchandise collection, including a blanket, rubber strap, lantern, glass, and a voice pack.
